title: Nature’s Power Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The way heat or electricity moves through a material.
choices: conduction
stratosphere
mechanization
rounds.answer: conduction
rounds.explanation: conduction: The way heat or electricity moves through a material.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person who believes that everyone should share things equally and that the government should help make this happen.
choices: conduction
stratosphere
socialist
rounds.answer: socialist
rounds.explanation: socialist: A person who believes that everyone should share things equally and that the government should help make this happen.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The process of changing something from one form to another.
choices: stratosphere
conversion
conduction
rounds.answer: conversion
rounds.explanation: conversion: The process of changing something from one form to another.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The process of transferring pollen from one flower to another to help plants make seeds.
rounds.answer: pollination

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who believes in a system where the government owns everything and shares it equally among people.
rounds.answer: communist

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The ability to start something on your own without being told.
rounds.answer: initiative

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: Bees help with pollination by moving pollen between flowers.
The airplane flew high in the stratosphere, above the clouds.
We need to do some preparation before the school play starts.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A person who believes that everyone should share things equally and that the government should help make this happen.
A system where the government controls important things like schools and hospitals to help everyone equally.
A system where the government owns all property and everyone shares what they need.
An economic system where people own businesses and make money by selling goods and services.
rounds.answer: An economic system where people own businesses and make money by selling goods and services.
rounds.explanation: In capitalism, people can start their own shops and sell things to earn money.

choices: A person who believes in a system where the government owns everything and shares it equally among people.
A person who believes that everyone should share things equally and that the government should help make this happen.
A person who uses money to make more money by starting businesses or investing.
A system where the government owns all property and everyone shares what they need.
rounds.answer: A person who uses money to make more money by starting businesses or investing.
rounds.explanation: The capitalist opened a new store to sell toys and make a profit.

choices: A person who believes in a system where the government owns everything and shares it equally among people.
A system where the government controls important things like schools and hospitals to help everyone equally.
A system where the government owns all property and everyone shares what they need.
The group of people who manage or organise a school, company, or government.
rounds.answer: A system where the government controls important things like schools and hospitals to help everyone equally.
rounds.explanation: In a socialism system, everyone shares resources so that no one is too poor or too rich.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She showed great initiative by starting a recycling programme at school.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
